title: Local Government (Urban Authorities) (Conferment of Municipal Council Status) Order, 2015
title_en: Local Government (Urban Authorities) (Conferment of Municipal Council Status) Order, 2015

provisions.title: Citation and commencement
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Local Government (Urban Authorities) (Conferment Of Municipal Council Status) Order, 2015
This Order shall come into operation on the date of publication in the Government Gazette .

The geographical area of the Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council established by this Order shall consist of Divisions, Wards, Mitaa, Villages and Vitongoji respectively specified in the First Schedule.
The boundary description of Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council established under this order shall be as described in the Second Schedule.
The area of the existing the boundaries of the existing Kinondoni, Mpanda, Temeke, Municipal Councils shall be as specified in the Third Schedule of this Order.
The boundary description of the existing Kinondoni Municipal Council, Mpanda Town Council Temeke Municipal Council shall be as specified in the Fourth Schedule to this Order.

provisions.title: Official Seal of established Town Council
provisions.content: (1) The Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council shall at its first meeting of the Council, establish such device bearing its official title and any other particulars or matters, as it may determine to the official Seal of that Council. (2) The official Seal of the Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council shall after being approved by the Council be published in the Gazette . (3) Until such time when the official seal of the Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council is published in the Gazette , the Council shall use a rubber stamp device, designed in such form or shape as the Council may determine.

The Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council shall upon its establishment take over and be responsible for such assets, property, liability and other matters as are and in the manner specified in the relevant provisions of the laws.

provisions.title: Application of legal documents
provisions.content: All the Bylaws, instruments, orders and all other legal documents made by the Kinondoni Municipal Council, Mpanda Town Council, Temeke Municipal Council shall continue to be in force as if they were made by the Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council until the time Kigamboni, Ubungo Mpanda Municipal Council makes its own Bylaws, instruments, orders, and all other legal documents. First Schedule 1. (Names of New Municipal Councils) 1. Kigamboni 2. Mpanda 3. Ubungo 2. (Names of existing Municipal Councils and Town Council) 1. Kinondoni 2. Mpanda 3. thence Southerly along the coastline to Ras Kiromoni; thence at the bearing 110 degrees South Easterly to a point a kilometer due North of Mbudya island; thence at bearings 150 ½ degrees South Easterly including all of the coastal islands in the Kinondoni District to a survey point TP 1; thence South Westward for 3 kilometers to a point which is about 3.2 kilometres North East of Salender bridge; thence South Westwards to Salender bridge; thence up stream the Msimbazi River to the southern boundary of Kigogo ward thence along the said boundary to meet the southern boundary of Mabibo Ward thence easterly along Mabibo ward boundary to form Mabibo to Mburahati Makurumla to Mzimuni, Manzese to Tandale, Sinza to Kijitonyama, Ubungo to Makongo, Kimara and Saranga to makongo up to Mbezi river, thence downstream along Mbezi river to the we northern boundary of Goba ward thence west ward along the said boundary to Mbezi ward boundard to mpiji river thence down steam along Mpiji river to commencement at Mpiji river estuary. Temeke Municipal Council Commencing at a survey point TP1 in the Indian ocean, thence Southerly including all of the coastal islands in Temeke district to Ras Dege, thence along the coastline to the estuary of Mkundi river, thence Westerly along the coastline to meet the estuary of Mbezi river, thence along Mbezi Mbezi river for 2.1 kilometers to meet one of its tributaries North Westerly for 5 kilometers to meet another confluence of Mbezi river and the unmed tributary; thence up stream along the left side tributary of Mbezi river to its source, which is approximately 8.2 kilometres due North; thence; Northwesterly for a distance of 1 kilometre of the kimbiji to Vikindu road junction; thence in the same direction for approximately 8.6 kilometers to Nguva river source, thence Southwesterly to the source of Mkokosi river at Kazole, thence downstream along Mkokosi river to a point where it croses Kongowe to Mjimwema road; thence acroas this road Westerly to Bunguni river; thence along Bunguni river in a Northerly direction to meet Mzinga river; thence along Mzinga river Southwesterly for 8.5 kilometers meet another Mzinga river tributary; thence along Mzinga river tributary to a point approximately 3.2 kilometres to meet the junction of Temeke and Ilala District boundaries; thence Northward for 2 1/4 kilometres to meet Mzinga river; thence 5 kilometers due Northwest in a generally straight line to a point which is before Chasimba Swamps; thence downstream along Kizinga riverdue Northeastwards for approximately 10 kilometre; thence along Kizinga river to its confluence with Kizinga tributary; thence Northwards along one of Kizinga tributaries; thence to a point where TAZARA Railway line crosses Kitunda to Vituka road, thence due East along the TAZARA Railway line for 5.5 kilometre; thence to a point where the TAZARA railway line meets the open draige channel; thence due North along the open draige channel to a point it reaches Nyerere road; thence across one of Nyerere road dual carriageway to the centre of Nyerere road dual carriage way; thence due East to the point of intersection between Nyerere and Nelson Mandela roads; thence Northwards along Nelson Mandela to the point where the Central Railway line crosses Nelson Mandela road; thence due East along the Central Railway line to its junction with the Railway line towards the port; thence in an Easterly direction along the the Railway line towards the port to the point where it reaches the railway sidings; thence along one of the Railway sidings to the North Easterly direction to the main QUAY; thence along the coastline to Malind Wharf, thence in the North East direction along coastline to the ferry pier; thence across the ferry to the East ferry point; thence along the coastline to Ras Rongoni, thence NorthEasterly in a straightline the boundary runs into the Indian Ocean at a survey point TP 1 a point of the commencement.
